home.hero_subtitle: Master English, Spanish or Mandarin with native teachers. Designed for professionals, students and world travelers.
home.courses_sub: Structured programs for every level — from complete beginner to business fluency.
home.how_sub: Our proven method gets you speaking faster than traditional classroom courses.
home.step1_text: Take our free placement test and start exactly where you should — no wasted time on what you already know.
home.step2_text: Live sessions with native teachers, interactive exercises and real-world scenarios for business, travel and more.
home.step3_text: Track your progress, earn your certificate and use your new language with confidence from day one.
home.test_sub: Over 5,000 professionals, students and travelers have accelerated their careers with LingoUp.
home.teachers_sub: All native speakers. All certified. All passionate about helping you reach fluency.
home.cta_title: Ready to speak a new language?
home.cta_sub: Join thousands of students and start your journey today. First trial class is free.

courses.page_sub: Flexible, intensive and results-driven programs tailored to adult learners.
courses.diff_sub: We combine proven methodology, native teachers and real-world practice to get you results faster.
